# IMP Douro

> Professional property maintenance and renovation company based in Dubai, UAE.

IMP Douro provides reliable home and commercial property maintenance, renovations, painting, landscaping and handyman services across Dubai. Trusted by homeowners, landlords and property managers for fast, high-quality work.

## Services

- [Property Maintenance Dubai](https://impdouro.com/#services): Electrical repairs, plumbing, AC servicing, general building maintenance and preventive programs.
- [Handyman Services Dubai](https://impdouro.com/#services): Furniture assembly, TV mounting, door/lock repairs, curtain installation, minor fixes.
- [Painting Services Dubai](https://impdouro.com/#services): Interior and exterior painting for villas, apartments and offices using high-quality finishes.
- [Landscaping & Garden Maintenance](https://impdouro.com/#services): Garden design, irrigation systems, lawn care, tree trimming and outdoor maintenance.
- [Renovations & Refurbishments](https://impdouro.com/#services): Kitchen renovations, bathroom remodeling, flooring, custom carpentry and full property upgrades.
- [Villa Maintenance Packages](https://impdouro.com/#packages): Regular maintenance plans covering AC, plumbing, electrical, garden and general repairs.

## Areas Served in Dubai

Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Hills, Arabian Ranches, Jumeirah, Victory Heights, Sports City, Motor City, JVC, JVT, Business Bay, Townsquare, Mira, Mudon, Silicon Oasis, Mirdif, DIP, Villanova, Serena, Damac Hills, Remraam, Springs, Greens.
